results.code:
263         # This avoids the overhead of the search_index virtual table
264         query = text(f"""
265         WITH RECURSIVE entity_graph AS (
266             -- Base case: seed entities
267             SELECT 
268                 e.id,
269                 'entity' as type,
270                 e.title, 
271                 e.permalink,
272                 e.file_path,
273                 NULL as from_id,
274                 NULL as to_id,
275                 NULL as relation_type,
276                 NULL as content,
277                 NULL as category,
278                 NULL as entity_id,
279                 0 as depth,
280                 e.id as root_id,
281                 e.created_at,
282                 e.created_at as relation_date,
283                 0 as is_incoming
284             FROM entity e
285             WHERE e.id IN ({entity_id_values})
286             {date_filter}
287 
288             UNION ALL
289 
290             -- Get relations from current entities
291             SELECT
292                 r.id,
293                 'relation' as type,
294                 r.relation_type || ': ' || r.to_name as title,
295                 -- Relation model doesn't have permalink column - we'll generate it at runtime
296                 '' as permalink,
297                 e_from.file_path,
298                 r.from_id,
299                 r.to_id,
300                 r.relation_type,
301                 NULL as content,
302                 NULL as category,
303                 NULL as entity_id,
304                 eg.depth + 1,
305                 eg.root_id,
306                 e_from.created_at, -- Use the from_entity's created_at since relation has no timestamp
307                 e_from.created_at as relation_date,
308                 CASE WHEN r.from_id = eg.id THEN 0 ELSE 1 END as is_incoming
309             FROM entity_graph eg
310             JOIN relation r ON (
311                 eg.type = 'entity' AND
312                 (r.from_id = eg.id OR r.to_id = eg.id)
313             )
314             JOIN entity e_from ON (
315                 r.from_id = e_from.id
316                 {relation_date_filter}
317             )
318             WHERE eg.depth < :max_depth
319 
320             UNION ALL
321 
322             -- Get entities connected by relations
323             SELECT
324                 e.id,
325                 'entity' as type,
326                 e.title,
327                 CASE 
328                     WHEN e.permalink IS NULL THEN '' 
329                     ELSE e.permalink 
330                 END as permalink,
331                 e.file_path,
332                 NULL as from_id,
333                 NULL as to_id,
334                 NULL as relation_type,
335                 NULL as content,
336                 NULL as category,
337                 NULL as entity_id,
338                 eg.depth + 1,
339                 eg.root_id,
340                 e.created_at,
341                 eg.relation_date,
342                 eg.is_incoming
343             FROM entity_graph eg
344             JOIN entity e ON (
345                 eg.type = 'relation' AND
346                 e.id = CASE 
347                     WHEN eg.is_incoming = 0 THEN eg.to_id
348                     ELSE eg.from_id
349                 END
350                 {date_filter}
351             )
352             WHERE eg.depth < :max_depth
353             -- Only include entities connected by relations within timeframe if specified
354             {timeframe_condition}
355         )
356         SELECT DISTINCT 
357             type,
358             id,
359             title,
360             permalink,
361             file_path,
362             from_id,
363             to_id,
364             relation_type,
365             content,
366             category,
367             entity_id,
368             MIN(depth) as depth,
369             root_id,
370             created_at
371         FROM entity_graph
372         WHERE (type, id) NOT IN ({values})
373         GROUP BY
374             type, id
375         ORDER BY depth, type, id
376         LIMIT :max_results
377        """)
378
